suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0/1 launch status and ePBS stability assessment
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #234 set Monday (April 14) as decision point for ePBS stability to determine DevNet 0 vs bal-devnet-4 path. Need confirmation of which path was taken and current testing status.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 dynamic cost spec and gas accounting edge cases resolution
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 3 discovered edge cases with spillover gas and state refunds. DevNet 4 planned with dynamic cost spec but dependent on ePBS stability decision. Critical blocker for Glamsterdam progression.

suggestions.topic: Account Abstraction proposal alignment and breakout call scheduling
suggestions.rationale: AA breakout was requested in #234 to align on path forward after Frame transactions CFI'd as non-headliner. Strong community support exists but clients divided on approach. Needs coordination before proposals diverge further.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing EIPs readiness for DevNet inclusion
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #234 proposed gas repricing EIPs for DevNet 0 with final version in DevNet 1. Need status on EIP-7976, EIP-7904, and other repricing proposals targeting 60 Mgas/s baseline.

suggestions.topic: Engine API changes for ePBS and checkpoint sync
suggestions.rationale: Two engine API changes discussed in #234: allowing zero safe/finalized block hash for checkpoint sync, and removing FCU shortcut for ePBS payload reorgs. Need CFI decision and implementation timeline.

suggestions.topic: History pruning minimum retention period consensus
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #234 showed consensus emerging around 1 month minimum history retention (plus unfinalized blocks). Action item to continue discussion in Discord, but synchronous alignment may be needed before EIP finalization.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8070 Sparse Mempool client feedback and implementation status
suggestions.rationale: CFI'd in #233 with Geth prototype complete. Feedback requested from other clients but no updates in #234. Low priority unless blocking issues emerge.

suggestions.topic: SSZ over REST for engine API performance improvements
suggestions.rationale: Proposed in #234 as non-consensus performance optimization for engine API. Informational discussion to gauge client interest and implementation feasibility.
